prompt: nul-lifestyle-1x1-05-v1: Square 1:1 editorial group fitness photograph on a clean seamless white cyclorama studio. Three athletes in matching white training apparel side by side — left: a fit man in a white tee and white shorts hoisting a black weighted slam ball overhead, center: a Black woman in a white long-sleeve crop and white briefs with a black slam ball pressed straight up above her head, right: a woman in a black athletic top and white shorts (cropped at the right frame edge) raising a black slam ball overhead. Slow-shutter motion blur is applied ONLY to the lifting arms and the slam balls — the moving arms and balls of the outer two athletes smear horizontally into translucent ghost trails along the lift path; the central woman's lifting arms stay sharper and her ball remains anchored. The bodies, faces, and clothing remain tack-sharp. Bright clean studio key light, slight floor shadow, muted off-white-and-black palette with warm skin midtones. Subtle fine 35mm film grain — understated, not heavy. No logos, no text.

nul-lifestyle-1x1-05-v2: Square 1:1 editorial fitness photograph on a clean seamless white cyclorama studio. A single fit woman in a white athletic crop and white shorts standing in the center of the frame, captured mid wall-ball-slam — a black weighted slam ball just released from her hands, her arms still extended upward following through the throw. Slow-shutter motion blur ONLY on the rising arms and the slam ball — they smear into clear vertical ribbon-streaks along the throw path with translucent secondary exposures of the ball trailing along the trajectory. The body, face, and clothing remain tack-sharp. Bright clean studio light, neutral palette with warm skin tones. Subtle fine 35mm film grain — understated, not heavy. Cinematic editorial. No text, no logos.

nul-lifestyle-1x1-05-v3: Square 1:1 editorial fitness photograph on a clean seamless white cyclorama studio. Two athletes in white training apparel facing each other a few feet apart, mid medicine-ball pass — a black weighted ball traveling between them through the air, the thrower's arms extended forward in follow-through, the catcher's arms reaching forward to receive. Slow-shutter motion blur ONLY on the moving ball and the thrower's extended arms — they smear into a clear horizontal ribbon-streak following the path of the throw, with translucent secondary exposures of the ball along the trajectory. Both bodies, faces, and clothing remain tack-sharp. Bright clean studio key light, neutral white palette with warm skin tones. Subtle fine 35mm film grain — understated, not heavy. Editorial cinematic. No logos, no text.

nul-lifestyle-1x1-06-v1: Square 1:1 candid documentary gym photograph. Tight close framing on a young woman with dark wavy hair pulled back, golden-brown skin, sweaty after a hard workout, wiping her forehead with the back of her right forearm — eyes glancing sideways, lips slightly parted. She wears a black athletic top. A second blurry female figure in dark workout gear is partially visible behind her left shoulder. Background is a softly lit blue-grey gym wall. Slow-shutter motion blur ONLY on the wiping arm — the right forearm and back-of-hand smear into a clear horizontal ribbon-streak along the wipe path, with translucent secondary exposures of the hand trailing along the motion. The face, hair, and rest of the body remain tack-sharp. Cool overcast natural light, gritty but understated 35mm Portra 800 grain — present but not heavy. Slightly desaturated palette with warm skin midtones. Documentary editorial style, no text, no logos.

nul-lifestyle-1x1-07-v1: Square 1:1 low-angle action photograph against a clear deep-cyan summer sky. An athletic woman shot from below, mid-stride sprint, wearing fitted beige / sandstone athletic apparel, captured at the peak of a stride with one leg driving forward and arms pumping. Slow-shutter motion blur ONLY on the moving limbs — both arms and the driving leg smear into clear directional ribbon-streaks along their motion paths, with translucent secondary exposures trailing. The center of the body and the head remain mostly anchored against the sky. Golden-hour warm sun rakes across her skin from frame-right. Background sky is bold saturated cyan-blue with a subtle gradient. Subtle fine 35mm Kodachrome-style grain — understated, not heavy. Warm-vs-cool tonal contrast. Cinematic editorial sport photography, no text, no logos.
